task_name: Add New AI Image Provider to Vercel AI SDK

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the plan I researched and designed for the `@ai-sdk/pixelart` package:

## Summary

I studied `packages/prodia` (the simplest image-capable provider) and `packages/openai/src/image/` (the full `ImageModelV3` implementation) to identify the exact patterns to follow. The plan creates **9 new files** exclusively under `packages/pixelart/`, touching nothing else.

### Files to create

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `package.json` | `@ai-sdk/pixelart` with workspace deps, tsup build scripts, standard CJS+ESM exports |
| `tsconfig.json` | Extends shared `@vercel/ai-tsconfig`, references `../provider` + `../provider-utils` |
| `tsconfig.build.json` | Same as tsconfig.json but `composite: false` for tsup compatibility |
| `tsup.config.ts` | Single entry, CJS+ESM+dts+sourcemap, injects `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` |
| `src/version.ts` | Build-time version constant |
| `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId` + `PixelArtImageSettings` (`size`, `style`, `pixelDensity`) |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3` — warns on unsupported features (aspectRatio, seed, files, mask), POSTs JSON to `/images/generate`, returns b64 images |
| `src/pixelart-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt()` factory, `PixelArtProvider`/`PixelArtProviderSettings` interfaces, `pixelart` default export; unsupported model types throw `NoSuchModelError` |
| `src/index.ts` | Barrel: exports `createPixelArt`, `pixelart`, all 3 required types, `VERSION` |

### Key design decisions
- **`PixelArtImageSettings`** (`style`, `pixelDensity`, `size`) are model-level constructor settings, with `providerOptions.pixelart` available for per-call overrides
- Reuses `postJsonToApi`, `combineHeaders`, `createJsonResponseHandler`, `createJsonErrorResponseHandler`, `loadApiKey`, `withoutTrailingSlash`, `withUserAgentSuffix` from `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`
- API key loaded from `options.apiKey` or `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var
- No existing files modified
